product.name: ArD3E3
product.familyDescriptorPl: Trudnopalna tkanina wielofunkcyjna z ochroną antystatyczną
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant fabrics for molten metal splash protection
product.titleDescriptor: 54% Viscose Fr 20% Polyamide 6.6 20% Wool 5% p-aramid 1% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant Antistatic Molten Metal Splash Fabric
product.specLine: 350 g/m², 54% Viscose Fr 20% Polyamide 6.6 20% Wool 5% p-aramid 1% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant
descriptions: Antistatic Satin Fabric 54% Viscose Fr 20% Polyamide 6.6 20% Wool 5% p-aramid 1% Carbon, inherent flame retardant antistatic satin fabric for molten metal splash protection . ArD3E3 fabric is used to make jacket and trousers for hot metal, steel and aluminum industries.
It is resistant to hot metal splash around 1500'C degrees.
ArD3E3 are inherent flame retardant with EN 11612 D3 E3 level certification.
Suitable for antistatic application, certified for EN ISO 1149-5.
It provides arc flash protection with EN 61482 class 1 (4 kA) certification.
54% Viscose Fr 20% Polyamide 6.6 20% Wool 5% p-aramid 1% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant Antistatic Molten Metal Splash Fabric

evidence: Resistant to hot metal splash around 1500'C degrees
used to make jacket and trousers for hot metal, steel and aluminum industries
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit molten metal splash protection category, EN ISO 11611 welding certification, and stated use for hot metal/steel/aluminum industries directly support welding/metallurgy application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Explicit electric arc flash protection certification (EN 61482) with quantified ATPV rating, beyond generic antistatic, directly supports high-voltage/electric-arc energy sector use.
Explicit EN ISO 20471 high-visibility certification and hi-vis property tag directly support high-visibility warning clothing application.
Chemical resistance (EN 13034) could relate to protective barrier garments, but no explicit medical/healthcare use is stated.
No explicit military, police or uniformed-service use is stated despite multi-hazard protective properties.

primary.rationale: The product is explicitly categorized and certified for molten metal splash and welding protection, with direct statements of use in hot metal, steel and aluminum industries, making metallurgy/welding the clearest dominant application.

secondary.rationale: The fabric carries explicit electric arc flash certification with quantified ATPV rating beyond generic antistatic properties, supporting an independent energy-sector protective use alongside its primary welding/molten-metal application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: EN ISO 20471 certification and hi-vis tag present, but the product's core described use and category are molten metal/welding protection, not warning visibility.
Chemical resistance certification exists but no explicit medical or healthcare use is stated.
No explicit military or uniformed-service use stated.
More specific welding/molten-metal application is directly supported and takes precedence.
